lines.english: They love the One Lord; their minds are filled with love for the Lord.
The One Lord of the Universe is the Support of His humble servants.
They are in love with the Supreme Lord God;

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਨਿਧਾਨ ਜਨ ਕੈ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sarab nidhaan jan kai har naau |3|
lines.english: The Name of the Lord is all treasures for them. ||3||
Nanak's God is Incomparable and Infinite. ||4||24||93||
their actions are pure, and their lifestyle is true.
The Perfect Guru has dispelled the darkness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਤਰੈ ਜਨੁ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jis man vasai tarai jan soe |
lines.english: Those whose minds are filled with the Lord, swim across.
Those who have the blessing of good karma, meet with the Lord.
Gauree Gwaarayree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਖੁ ਰੋਗੁ ਕਛੁ ਭਉ ਨ ਬਿਆਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: dookh rog kachh bhau na biaapai |
lines.english: Pain, disease and fear do not affect them at all.
They meditate on the Ambrosial Name of the Lord within their hearts. ||1||
Meditate on the Supreme Lord God, the Transcendent Lord.
The Merciful Lord is the Doer, the Cause of causes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪੂਰੇ ਤੇ ਇਹ ਮਤਿ ਪਾਈਐ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur poore te ih mat paaeeai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: From the Perfect Guru, this understanding is obtained. ||1||Pause||
He cherishes and nurtures all beings and creatures.
Serving Him, all treasures are obtained.
He is Inaccessible, Incomprehensible, Eternal and Infinite.
Meditate on Him, O my mind, through the Teachings of the Perfect Guru. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੀ ਟਹਲ ਨ ਬਿਰਥੀ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kee ttehal na birathee jaae |
lines.english: Working for Him is never in vain;

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sadaa sadaa har ke gun gaae |3|
lines.english: forever and ever, sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||3||
Worshipping God, honor is obtained.
Show Mercy to me, O God, O Searcher of hearts.
All beings and creatures seek Your Sanctuary;
The Unseen Lord and Master is the Treasure of Peace.
Nanak is blessed to receive the greatness of the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||4||25||94||
Gauree Gwaarayree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਜਾ ਕੈ ਹੈ ਹਾਥ ॥
lines.translit: jeea jugat jaa kai hai haath |
lines.english: Our way of life is in His Hands;
remember Him, the Master of the masterless.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਚਿਤਿ ਆਏ ਸਭੁ ਦੁਖੁ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: prabh chit aae sabh dukh jaae |
lines.english: When God comes to mind, all pains depart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈ ਸਭ ਬਿਨਸਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਕੈ ਨਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bhai sabh binaseh har kai naae |1|
lines.english: All fears are dispelled through the Name of the Lord. ||1||
He established the many worlds and skies.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਬਿਸਰਤ ਕਾਹੇ ਸੁਖੁ ਜਾਨਹਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har bisarat kaahe sukh jaaneh |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Forgetting the Lord, why do you pretend to be at peace? ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਭਉ ਕਾਹੇ ਕਾ ਮਾਨਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: bin har bhau kaahe kaa maaneh |
lines.english: Why do you fear any other than the Lord?
Meditate, meditate in remembrance on God, and become fearless. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੀ ਬਖਸ ਨ ਮੇਟੈ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kee bakhas na mettai koe |
lines.english: no one can revoke His Blessing.
The soul is illumined with His Light;
In it are the many sacred shrines of pilgrimage and cleansing baths.
Twenty-four hours a day, meditate in remembrance on God's Name.
Seek the Sanctuary of the Supreme Lord God.
Giving him His Hand, the Perfect Guru protects him.
The Perfect King is self-sufficient.
God's servant has true faith in Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਕਲੰਕ ਖਿਨ ਮਹਿ ਮਿਟਿ ਜਾਹਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: kott kalank khin meh mitt jaeh |3|
lines.english: Millions of mistakes shall be erased in an instant. ||3||
O Nanak, the Supreme Lord God is All-powerful. ||4||26||95||
By Guru's Grace, my mind is attached to the Naam, the Name of the Lord.
Gauree Gwaarayree, Fifth Mehl:
Asleep for so many incarnations, it is now awakened.
I chant the Ambrosial Bani, the Glorious Praises of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰਿ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਸੁਖ ਸਹਜ ਸਬਾਏ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: ghar baahar sukh sehaj sabaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Within my home, and outside as well, there is peace and poise all around. ||1||Pause||
Meditating in remembrance on God, I have found total peace.
The Pure Teachings of the Perfect Guru have been revealed to me. ||1||
I have recognized the One who created me.
Showing His Mercy, God has blended me with Himself.
Taking me by the arm, He has made me His Own.
Mantras, tantras, all-curing medicines and acts of atonement,

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਕਥਾ ਸਦਾ ਜਪੁ ਜਪਨਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: har har kathaa sadaa jap japanaa |2|
lines.english: I continually chant and meditate on the Sermon of the Lord, Har, Har. ||2||
